ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Player's number on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "home_color" TEXT /* Home color of the team */,
  "away_color" TEXT /* Away color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the match was played */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday of the season */,
  "team_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "score_team_1" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_team_2" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the team that won the season */,
  "relegated_teams" TEXT /* Names of the teams that got relegated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "grass_type" TEXT /* Type of grass used in the venue */,
  "venue_class" TEXT /* Class of the venue (e.g., 4-star, 5-star) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's tenure */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "total_goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total number of points */,
  "average_possession" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "average_shots_per_game" REAL /* Average number of shots per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total number of minutes played */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists */,
  "total_fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed */,
  "total_fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls suffered */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average player rating */,
  "average_shots_per_game" REAL /* Average number of shots per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "expected_recovery_time" INTEGER /* Expected number of weeks for recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee in millions of euros */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
